---
title: "About Me."
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg){fig-align="center"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Kırıkkale University, Turkey, 2009 - 2013.

-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Firm xxx, position xx, year xxx

2.  Firm yyy, position yyy, year yyy

## Internships

1.  Firm aaa, position xx, year xxx

2.  Firm bbb, position yyy, year yyy

# Projects

1.  TUBİTAK 1001..........................

# Publications

1.  Dasdemir, E., Batta, R., Koksalan, M., Tezcaner Ozturk, D. (2022) “UAV Routing for Reconnaissance Mission: A Multi-Objective Orienteering Problem with Time-Dependent Prizes and Multiple Connections”, Computers & Operations Research, 145: 105882.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
